title: ToolDefinition
description: A tool registered with the AgentSession. The loop dispatches to this tool when the model response carries stop_reason=tool_use and names this tool.

name.description: Unique identifier within a session. Matched to stop_reason=tool_use calls.

description.description: Human-readable description passed to the model. Not used by loop control flow.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema validated against ToolCall.input before execution (Principle II, FR-008).
